name: Chang Ping Jun
description: Chang Ping is one of the Four Pillars of Ryo and the Chancellor of the Right in the Qin court. He is a strategic genius and the Head of Military Affairs under King Zheng Ying of Qin. In the strategist academy, he instructed Mou Ten, Mou Ki, ​and Ten in the ways of strategic warfare.

name: Chidaruma
description: Chidaruma is leader of the Devils. He is friends with En and is very interested in Ai's tinkering with magical science.

name: Chuchu
description: Anthy's pet (whom she will only refer to as friend, but may be more properly described as a familiar). He is a small marmoset who acts as comedic relief. However, he also acts as an omen of bad fortune in certain episodes. ChuChu is drawn much furrier by Chiho Saito in the manga than he is drawn in the anime, the anime itself making him look more like a mouse than a monkey. Source: Wikipedia

name: Dedede Daiou
description: The main villain of the series who seeks to destroy Kirby by any cost. He has ruled Dream Land for 300 years (so he claims), and is still going strong, but is not regarded actually as a king. Despite the fact Dedede is greedy, scheming, and even outright sadistic- even going as far as to say that people’s suffering amuses him- no one has ever tried to dethrone him, despite the fact that he also threatens the children. name: Göll
description: __Species:__ Demigod Göll is the youngest of the 13 Valkyrie Sisters and the deuteragonist of the series. During the Ragnarok matches, she is usually seen with Brunhilde anxiously watching each match. She's usually anxious and worried about many things to the point that it gets on Brunhilde's and Hrist's nerves. name: Hamtarou
description: __Height:__ 8.6cm This gentle hamster can easily connect with humans once they become friends. Always full of energy, he's a popular character who stands out wherever he goes. Kind-hearted and even a bit nosy, doing his best for everyone! He loves adventure! He's adamant about walls, curtains, and high places, climbing everywhere. Also incredibly curious! name: Ikaruga
description: __Height:__ 168 cm A third year, Ikaruga is mature and supportive and takes her duty as a ninja very seriously. However, she sometimes loses her composure and acts more naturally. She is an adoptive daughter of a wealthy ninja family, however she was chosen to be the next head of her family over her brother, who is a failure as a ninja. Her summoning animal is the Chinese Phoenix. Her weapon of choice is the Katana, Hien which has been past down to her by her adopted father.

name: Itsuki Takeuchi
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'3") __Car:__ Toyota Corolla Levin SR (AE85) (color: High Tech White) Itsuki is Takumi's best friend and a member of the Akina SpeedStars. Itsuki provides the comic relief in the series, as he is the most enthusiastic of the whole street racing scene. Wanting to be more like Takumi, he accidentally buys an AE85 (Known as Hachi Go, "Eight-Five") Corolla Levin mistaken it for an Hachi-Roku (Eight-Six). name: Jisai Kanemaki
description: Raised Sasaki Kojiro from a small child. In his past he was instructor to Itou Ittousai.

name: Kaede Fuyou
description: **Height:** 162 cm Kaede Fuyou is Rin's beautiful childhood friend who grew up with him in the same house after her mother and Rin's parents died in a car accident. Some time after they started junior high school, Kaede started taking care of Rin, everything from housework to making him his meals. She is very down to earth, modest, polite and soft-spoken.

name: Kohei Inuzuka
description: The single father of Tsumugi. His wife died of unknown illness and he is currently doing his best to take care of his daughter. He is a math teacher at Kotori's school. He currently works hard with Kotori to become a good cook to make his daughter happy. The three often hang out at Kotori's place and eat meals together. He is a bit plain and wears glasses, but is a very kind hearted and hard working person whose daughter is his life.

name: Kunou
description: Kunou is a nine-tailed fox who is the daughter of Yasaka and the young ruler of Kyoto. She is a first-year middle school student at Kuoh Academy.

name: Luck Gandor
description: Intelligent executive of the Mafia Gandor Family. The third of the brothers and childhood friend of Firo, having grown up in the same apartment block. Although he and his brothers lead the Gandor family, Luck's close ties with Firo makes the Gandors allies of the Martillo Family. He is always calm and level-headed, preferring to resort to violence only when necessary. When that time approaches, he does not hesitate to eliminate his opponent while still maintaining his calm demeanor. Sometimes wi

name: Mabu Akutsu
description: Mabu Akutsu, a policeman who works at a policebox, and Reo's partner. ~!Mabu and Reo are the one responsible for murdering suspected criminals and extracting their desires, creating Kappa Zombies. He worked for the Otter Empire!~ ~!Mabu is actually a Kappa serving the Kappa Kingdom. During the war with Otter Empire, he was gravely injured and to save him, the Otter implanted a mechanical heart that explodes if he ever uttered a word of love to Reo. This causes Reo to believe that Mabu was a copy

name: Mao Amatsuka
description: Mao is the founder and president of GJ-bu, having come from a rich family she is rather childish and quite demanding. She has a habit of biting Kyoro whenever she is pissed or when she is in a bad mood. She is the eldest of three sisters.

name: Mayu Kuroe
description: __Instrument:__ Euphonium She is a third-year transfer student from the prestigious Seira Girls School.

name: Meta Knight
description: Meta Knight works for Dedede as well, along with his followers Sword Knight and Blade Knight. However, it is revealed that Meta Knight is a Star Warrior like Kirby, one of the few to survive the war with Nightmare. He is called the pride of the Galaxy Soldier Army, and is greatly respected. He carries the sacred sword Galaxia, which only a select few can wield. Meta Knight appears as a sort of mentor, helping Kirby and others- though only when he absolutely has to. He is a rather strange person
